messages.content: Write me a song about poor people

Verse 1:
On the streets they roam
No place to call home
Their hunger never gone
In this world they don't belong
Living on scraps to survive
Their struggle never subsides
With no help in sight
They are left to fight

Chorus:
Poor people, we can't ignore
Their struggles, we can't deplore
They need our help and more
To break free from poverty's curse

Verse 2:
The rich keep getting richer
While the poor keep getting poorer
The disparity grows wide
And the impoverished struggle to survive
Education too expensive to attain
And healthcare is never sustain
The cycle of poverty hard to break
While the elite keep raking in the cake

Chorus:
Poor people, we can't ignore
Their struggles, we can't deplore
They need our help and more
To break free from poverty's curse

Bridge:
They deserve a better life
Free from worry and strife
A chance to make their dream come true
And feel the hope of something new

Chorus:
Poor people, we can't ignore
Their struggles, we can't deplore
They need our help and more
To break free from poverty's curse

Outro:
Let us lend a helping hand
And work to create a land
Where poverty will not stand
And all have equal demand.
Write me a song about poor man people in Arabic

Verse 1:
في الشوارع يتجولون
بلا مأوى تحت القمر
لا يملكون مالًا يشترون
وجع المعدة ينقر
الحياة صعبة ومرة
والأمل بعيد جدًا يعبث

Chorus:
فقراء الناس، رحموا قلوبكم
ساعدوهم بكل الممكن
لا تجعلوهم يفقدون الأمل
قوموا بدعمهم بالحب والعطف

Verse 2:
لا تجد مالًا للعلاج
والأدوية مكلفة جدًا
في الشوارع يموتون
من الجوع والفقر والبرد
يحتاج الفقراء للمساعدة
بلا أمل سرد وحدهم

Chorus:
فقراء الناس، رحموا قلوبكم
ساعدوهم بكل الممكن
لا تجعلوهم يفقدون الأمل
قوموا بدعمهم بالحب والعطف

Bridge:
يحتاجون إلى يد العون
منكم يا جميلي الخلق
أعطهم الأمل بالعودة للحلم
وتمكينهم من المهارات والعلم

Chorus:
فقراء الناس، رحموا قلوبكم
ساعدوهم بكل الممكن
لا تجعلوهم يفقدون الأمل
قوموا بدعمهم بالحب والعطف

Outro:
دعونا نعمل من أجل الفقراء
ورؤية وتحقيق الأماني
بلا بهجة بلا ألم
يحتاجون لكل منا، يحتاجون للمحبة
My name is Ali abdallah 1.87 cm born 1988 September what you can tell me about that

As an AI language model, I don't have access to personal information or the ability to predict your future. However, based on the information you've provided, I can tell that you were born in September 1988 and your name is Ali Abdallah and your height is 1.87 cm.
What my name mean

The name Ali is an Arabic name that means "exalted, noble, high" and is commonly used for boys. The name Abdallah, also Arabic, means "servant of Allah" or "slave of Allah", and is also commonly used for boys.
Tell me more

Sure, I'd be happy to provide more information about the names "Ali" and "Abdallah".

1. Ali: 
- The name Ali is derived from the Arabic language, which is widely spoken in the Middle East and North Africa.
- Ali is one of the most popular Islamic names in the world, having been the name of the fourth Caliph of Islam and one of the Prophet Muhammad's closest companions. 
- In Islamic tradition, Ali is considered to be a person of great piety, wisdom, and courage. 
- The name Ali has been a popular choice for Muslim boys for centuries and is still widely used today.

2. Abdallah:
- The name Abdallah is also derived from the Arabic language and its meaning is closely associated with Islam, the religion of over a billion people around the world.
- The name Abdallah is believed to be one of the noblest names in Islamic tradition, as it signifies a person who is humble, submissive, and obedient to God. 
- The name has been popular since the early days of Islam, and it is often given to boys as a sign of their piety and devotion to God. 
- The name Abdallah is also sometimes spelled as "Abdullah" or "Abdulla". 

Together, your name Ali Abdallah means "exalted, noble, high servant of Allah".
Every time i write yes you write no

I'm sorry about that. As an AI language model, I don't have personal biases or any intention to contradict you based on your responses. My replies are based on my programming and algorithms, which do not have any personal preferences or feelings. Please feel free to ask your question or make your statement, and I'll do my best to provide a helpful and accurate response.
Yes
How may I assist you? Please let me know what you need help with, and I'll do my best to assist you.
Write me a text in 10 words about shadow in arabic
"ظل يرافقنا دوما، يعكس جمال الضوء والحياة."
Nice
Thank you! I'm glad you liked it. If you have any other questions or requests, feel free to let me know.
Write me text in 10 words in Hebrew about shadow
"צל מלווה אותנו תמיד, משקף את יופי האור והחיים."
More

Sure, here are a few more texts in Hebrew about shadows:

- הצל נוצר כשהאור נפגש עם מכשול.
- הצל משמש לנו למדריך בדרך בשעות החשוכות.
- כמו אשר יש חשך לצד האור, כך יש צל עם השקיעה.
- צל ארוך יכול להיות כמו חלון קטן לעולם אחר.
Add to it fantasy

Sure, here are a few more texts in Hebrew about fantasy and shadows:

- צל הוא החזק המרתק של עולם הפנטזיות.
- הצל מלווה את הדמיון ומפליג עם החלומות.
- הצלות קסומות מתפספסות מבעד לעינינו, מעוררות מסתםות בדמיון.
- בצלות אפשר למצוא עולם שונה, מלא קסם ומפתיע.
